title: Provenance Mixin v1
description: Universal provenance fields embedded in every record. Non-negotiable per CONVENTIONS.md §3.

source.description: Free-text but specific. Where this record came from. Examples: 'internal_research_corpus/ogz_creative_intelligence.md#section_3', 'client_session:01HXY...; question_id:13', 'benchmark:@account_handle; post_id:...', 'inference:approval_pattern_count:23'

date_added.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this record was first created. Never updated.

confirmer.description: Who confirmed this record. Examples: 'Mohamed', 'Alhareth', 'Cultural Advisor', 'CD lead', 'client', 'inference_engine'

confidence.description: confirmed = validated by human authority OR proven through repeated production. inferred = extracted from data signal but not human-validated. experimental = initial seed, not yet validated in production.

scope.description: What this record applies to. Format: 'universal' OR 'sector:<slug>' OR 'brand:<ulid>' OR 'region:<slug>' OR 'occasion:<slug>'. Multiple scopes combine with '+', e.g., 'sector:f_and_b+occasion:ramadan'.

last_updated.description: Optional. Set only when the record is updated (rare; most records are append-only).

update_reason.description: Optional. Required if last_updated is set. Why the update happened.

last_verified_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of last verification. Set to date_added initially, updated on re-verification.
